title: Natural Solutions: 10 Herbal Teas for Bladder Infection
description: Berberis vulgaris tea is a natural remedy that helps to treat bladder infections. This is because it contains a chemical called berberine, which has strong antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. When you drink Berberis vulgaris tea, the berberine works to kill the bacteria that cause bladder infections, such as E. coli. At the same time, it reduces inflammation in the bladder, making it less painful and uncomfortable. The tea also helps to prevent the bacteria from multiplying...
